ж–ҮжЎЈеҸҠз»„д»¶еә“
nodeзүҲжң¬з®ЎзҗҶ
npmеёёз”Ёе‘Ҫд»Ө
йЎ№зӣ®з»ҹдёҖзүҲжң¬

Appearance

Sidebar Navigation

cssеҚ•дҪҚе’Ңdpr

cssдёӯwidthзҡ„е°Ҹд№қд№қ

дҪҝз”Ёcss3зҡ„var()еҮҪж•°

еә”з”Ёж·ұжө…дё»йўҳ

ж°ҙе№іеһӮзӣҙеұ…дёӯ

BFC

cssдёӯзҡ„%

cssйў„еӨ„зҗҶеҷЁ

cssж ·ејҸйӣҶй”Ұ

On this page

Style вҖӢ

0.5px е…Ёиҫ№жЎҶ вҖӢ

li {
  position: relative;
  &::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    width: 200%;
    height: 200%;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    border: 1px solid #eee;
    border-radius: 16px;
    transform: scale(0.5, 0.5);
    transform-origin: 0 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }
}

0.5px дёӢиҫ№жЎҶ вҖӢ

li {
  position: relative;
  &::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    width: 200%;
    height: 1px;
    left: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    background-color: #eee;
    transform: scale(0.5);
    transform-origin: 0 0;
  }
}

дёүи§’еҪў вҖӢ

.triangle {
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
  border-width: 15px;
  border-style: solid;
  border-top-color: red;
  border-left-color: green;
  border-right-color: yellow;
  border-bottom-color: blue;
}

иЎҘе……пјҡдҪҝз”Ёsvgз»ҳеҲ¶дёүи§’еҪў

<svg width="100" height="100">
  <polygon points="100,100 100,0 0,100" fill="darkolivegreen" />
</svg>

ж»ҡеҠЁжқЎ вҖӢ

/* WebkitжөҸи§ҲеҷЁж»ҡеҠЁжқЎж ·ејҸ */
.common-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 8px; /* ж»ҡеҠЁжқЎе®ҪеәҰ */
}
.common-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: #f1f1f1; /* иҪЁйҒ“ */
  border-radius: 4px;
}
.common-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: #c1c1c1; /* ж»‘еқ— */
  border-radius: 4px;
}
.common-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background: #a8a8a8; /* жӮ¬еҒңж—¶ж»‘еқ—йўңиүІ */
}

ж–Үеӯ—жёҗеҸҳ вҖӢ

.gradient-text {
  background: linear-gradient(45deg, #ff6b6b, purple);
  background-clip: text;
  -webkit-background-clip: text; /* иғҢжҷҜиЈҒеүӘеҲ°ж–Үеӯ— */
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; /* ж–Үеӯ—йҖҸжҳҺ */
}

ж–Үеӯ—йҳҙеҪұ вҖӢ

text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);

text-shadow: 1px 1px 0 #FF3B2F, 
            2px 2px 0 purple, 
            3px 3px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6); /* еӨҡеұӮйҳҙеҪұ */

ж–Үеӯ—жәўеҮәзңҒз•Ҙ вҖӢ

йңҖиҰҒеӣәе®ҡе®ҪеәҰ

.text-ellipsis {
  white-space: nowrap; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

.text-ellipsis3 {
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 3; /* жҳҫзӨә3иЎҢ */
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  overflow: hidden;
}

жӮ¬жө®йҳҙеҪұеҠЁз”» вҖӢ

.navbar {
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 16px;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px #00000014, 0 2px 4px -2px #0000000f;
}
.navbar:hover {
  transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.02);
  box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px #00000026, 0 8px 10px -6px #0000001a;
}
Pager
дёҠдёҖйЎөcssйў„еӨ„зҗҶеҷЁ
